title: App's Visibility when sharing or exporting a file

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,
I wonder if it’s a planned improvement to make it possible to see the app’s views or widgets when exporting a workdoc or sharing a view with external customers? Or maybe there’s a way to do it now?
For example:

image1298×910 72.3 KB

Please let me know.
